title: selaginella radicans
intro: Selaginella radicans, also known as spike moss, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have various medicinal benefits. The health benefits of Selaginella radicans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a component in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
